name: Tiny Winged Turtlez
description: 5,000 small turtles with wings, randomly generated and fully stored onchain on the Ethereum blockchain.
about:
## Tiny Winged Turtlez

Tiny Winged Turtlez is a collection of 5,000 randomly generated NFTs featuring small turtles with wings. What sets this project apart is that all artwork and metadata is stored entirely onchain, with no reliance on external APIs or off-chain asset storage.

## Fully Onchain

Unlike many NFT projects that depend on centralized servers or IPFS for metadata and images, Tiny Winged Turtlez stores everything directly on the Ethereum blockchain. This approach ensures permanence, immutability, and true decentralization of the digital assets.

## Variable Rarity and Attributes

Each turtle in the collection features randomly generated attributes including:
- Turtle type (Normal, Zombie, Droid, Alien) with weighted rarity
- Wing type (Regular, Long, Tall, Spiky, Ruffled, Loose Feathers, Sparkly, Claw)
- Wing color (White, Bronze, Silver, Gold)
- Background color, accessories (bandana, boots), eyes, tail, and tongue

Each NFT is unique within the 5,000-piece collection.
risks: Pseudo randomness — trait generation uses blockhash(block.number - 1), which miners can see and manipulate
